headings.usage: Use for balances, main screen titles, and large numerical displays. Apply tight tracking.

body.usage: Geometric sans for readability in lists, labels, and transaction details.

components.WalletCard: Design as a high-end digital asset. Use a subtle neon cyan/green gradient for text or borders. Prominent balance display.
components.QRScanner: Full-screen camera viewport with a neon green scanning reticle overlay. Use a semi-transparent black overlay outside the reticle to focus attention.
components.TransactionList: Minimalist rows. Left: Neon icon (Arrow up/down) in a circular container. Middle: Title & Date. Right: Amount (+ in green, - in white).
components.Modals: Solid #121212 surface with an overlay background. Include large numeric keypads for top-up and withdrawal.

logo.description: Tag n Ride futuristic neon logo

backgrounds.description: Lagos city skyline at night for onboarding or login screen background. Must use a heavy black overlay (opacity 0.7+) for text legibility.
Night traffic/taxi vibe for driver profile or dashboard header area.

illustrations.description: Abstract neon/transit visual for empty transaction history states.

motion.transitions: Use React Native Reanimated or standard Animated for fast, snappy spring animations on modals.
motion.interaction: Apply scale-down effect (scale: 0.95) on active press for all buttons and interactive cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React Native Expo application. This is a mobile app, NOT a web app.
If using a styling library, prefer NativeWind or standard StyleSheet. The provided colors/spacing align with typical Tailwind tokens.
Implement the 'Dark Theme' globally by default. Set the main container backgrounds to #0A0A0A.
Design for low-end Android devices: avoid heavy blurred views (glassmorphism); stick to solid dark surfaces (#121212) with subtle 1px borders.
Ensure 'Scan & Pay' is the most prominent action (FAB or large primary button) on the Passenger dashboard.
The Driver dashboard should heavily emphasize the large QR code display for quick scanning.
Mandatory: Add 'testID' attributes to all interactive elements, inputs, and key informational elements (e.g., testID='login-phone-input') for testing.
Use the provided logo in the Auth flow and main headers.
